## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Mock CLI flow exercised when command behavior changed

## Safety

- [ ] Context access remains limited to explicit user paths
- [ ] No credentials, user context, `.aurous/` data, or MCP configuration is committed
- [ ] External mutations are previewed, confirmed, and bounded to saved actions
- [ ] New errors have stable codes and useful recovery guidance
